userErrors.message: Value must have a currency code.
Value must have a numeric amount.
Value must be a stringified JSON object with amount (numeric) and currency_code (string matching the shop's currency) fields.
Value contains an invalid currency, ZZZ.
Value cannot have an empty scheme (protocol), must include one of the following URL schemes: ["http", "https", "mailto", "sms", "tel"].'
Value must be one of the following URL schemes: http, https, mailto, sms, tel.
Value must be in “YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS” format. For example: 2022-06-01T15:30:00
